Interface ReactiveServerCommands

All Known Subinterfaces:
ReactiveClusterServerCommands
public interface ReactiveServerCommands
Redis Server commands executed using reactive infrastructure.
Since:
2.0
Author:
Mark Paluch, Christoph Strobl, Dennis Neufeld

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Mono<String>
    bgReWriteAof()
    Start an Append Only File rewrite process on server.
    Mono<String>
    bgSave()
    Start background saving of db on server.
    Mono<Long>
    dbSize()
    Get the total number of available keys in currently selected database.
    Mono<String>
    flushAll()
    Delete all keys from all databases.
    Mono<String>
    flushAll(RedisServerCommands.FlushOption option)
    Delete all keys from all databases using the specified RedisServerCommands.FlushOption.
    Mono<String>
    flushDb()
    Delete all keys of the currently selected database.
    Mono<String>
    flushDb(RedisServerCommands.FlushOption option)
    Delete all keys of the currently selected database using the specified RedisServerCommands.FlushOption.
    Flux<RedisClientInfo>
    getClientList()
    Request information and statistics about connected clients.
    Mono<String>
    getClientName()
    Returns the name of the current connection.
    Mono<Properties>
    getConfig(String pattern)
    Load configuration parameters for given pattern from server.
    Mono<Properties>
    info()
    Load default server information like memory cpu utilization replication
    Mono<Properties>
    info(String section)
    Load server information for given selection.
    Mono<String>
    killClient(String host, int port)
    Closes a given client connection identified by host:port.
    Mono<Long>
    lastSave()
    Get time unix timestamp of last successful bgSave() operation in seconds.
    Mono<String>
    resetConfigStats()
    Reset statistic counters on server.
    Mono<String>
    save()
    Synchronous save current db snapshot on server.
    Mono<String>
    setClientName(String name)
    Assign given name to current connection.
    Mono<String>
    setConfig(String param, String value)
    Set server configuration for param to value.
    default Mono<Long>
    time()
    Request server timestamp using TIME command in TimeUnit.MILLISECONDS.
    Mono<Long>
    time(TimeUnit timeUnit)
    Request server timestamp using TIME command.

  • Method Details

    • bgReWriteAof

      Mono<String> bgReWriteAof()
      Start an Append Only File rewrite process on server.
      Returns:
      Mono indicating command completion.
      See Also:
      • Redis Documentation: BGREWRITEAOF

    • bgSave

      Mono<String> bgSave()
      Start background saving of db on server.
      Returns:
      Mono indicating command received by server. Operation success needs to be checked via lastSave().
      See Also:
      • Redis Documentation: BGSAVE

    • lastSave

      Mono<Long> lastSave()
      Get time unix timestamp of last successful bgSave() operation in seconds.
      Returns:
      Mono wrapping unix timestamp.
      See Also:
      • Redis Documentation: LASTSAVE

    • save

      Mono<String> save()
      Synchronous save current db snapshot on server.
      Returns:
      Mono indicating command completion.
      See Also:
      • Redis Documentation: SAVE

    • dbSize

      Mono<Long> dbSize()
      Get the total number of available keys in currently selected database.
      Returns:
      Mono wrapping number of keys.
      See Also:
      • Redis Documentation: DBSIZE

    • flushDb

      Mono<String> flushDb()
      Delete all keys of the currently selected database.
      Returns:
      Mono indicating command completion.
      See Also:
      • Redis Documentation: FLUSHDB

    • flushDb

      Mono<String> flushDb(RedisServerCommands.FlushOption option)
      Delete all keys of the currently selected database using the specified RedisServerCommands.FlushOption.
      Parameters:
      option -
      Returns:
      Mono indicating command completion.
      Since:
      2.7
      See Also:
      • Redis Documentation: FLUSHDB

    • flushAll

      Mono<String> flushAll()
      Delete all keys from all databases.
      Returns:
      Mono indicating command completion.
      See Also:
      • Redis Documentation: FLUSHALL

    • flushAll

      Mono<String> flushAll(RedisServerCommands.FlushOption option)
      Delete all keys from all databases using the specified RedisServerCommands.FlushOption.
      Parameters:
      option -
      Returns:
      Mono indicating command completion.
      Since:
      2.7
      See Also:
      • Redis Documentation: FLUSHALL

    • info

      Mono<Properties> info()
      Load default server information like
      • memory
      • cpu utilization
      • replication
      Returns:
      Mono wrapping server information.
      See Also:
      • Redis Documentation: INFO

    • info

      Mono<Properties> info(String section)
      Load server information for given selection.
      Parameters:
      section - must not be null nor empty.
      Returns:
      Mono wrapping server information of given section.
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - when section is null or empty.
      See Also:
      • Redis Documentation: INFO

    • getConfig

      Mono<Properties> getConfig(String pattern)
      Load configuration parameters for given pattern from server.
      Parameters:
      pattern - must not be null.
      Returns:
      Mono wrapping configuration parameters matching given pattern.
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - when pattern is null or empty.
      See Also:
      • Redis Documentation: CONFIG GET

    • setConfig

      Mono<String> setConfig(String param, String value)
      Set server configuration for param to value.
      Parameters:
      param - must not be null nor empty.
      value - must not be null nor empty.
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - when pattern / value is null or empty.
      See Also:
      • Redis Documentation: CONFIG SET

    • resetConfigStats

      Mono<String> resetConfigStats()
      Reset statistic counters on server.
      Counters can be retrieved using info().
      Returns:
      Mono indicating command completion.
      See Also:
      • Redis Documentation: CONFIG RESETSTAT

    • time

      default Mono<Long> time()
      Request server timestamp using TIME command in TimeUnit.MILLISECONDS.
      Returns:
      Mono wrapping current server time in milliseconds.
      See Also:
      • Redis Documentation: TIME

    • time

      Mono<Long> time(TimeUnit timeUnit)
      Request server timestamp using TIME command.
      Parameters:
      timeUnit - target unit.
      Returns:
      Mono wrapping current server time in TimeUnit.
      Since:
      2.5
      See Also:
      • Redis Documentation: TIME

    • killClient

      Mono<String> killClient(String host, int port)
      Closes a given client connection identified by host:port.
      Parameters:
      host - of connection to close. Must not be null nor empty.
      port - of connection to close
      Returns:
      Mono wrapping String representation of the command result.
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if host is null or empty.
      See Also:
      • Redis Documentation: CLIENT KILL

    • setClientName

      Mono<String> setClientName(String name)
      Assign given name to current connection.
      Parameters:
      name - must not be null nor empty.
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - when name is null or empty.
      See Also:
      • Redis Documentation: CLIENT SETNAME

    • getClientName

      Mono<String> getClientName()
      Returns the name of the current connection.
      Returns:
      Mono wrapping the connection name.
      See Also:
      • Redis Documentation: CLIENT GETNAME

    • getClientList

      Flux<RedisClientInfo> getClientList()
      Request information and statistics about connected clients.
      Returns:
      Flux emitting RedisClientInfo objects.
      See Also:
      • Redis Documentation: CLIENT LIST
